news.headline: Global APM transactions set to rise by 170% due to surge in domestic digital wallets, instant, and QR payments. Domestic APMs surpassing international, becoming primary choice for emerging markets.
news.summary: In the digital payment realm, domestic APMs are surpassing international APMs in emerging markets, claims global intelligence firm ABI Research. The total value of APM transactions worldwide has reached a significant milestone.

news.headline: JLL report: 59% of organizations plan to increase investment in office space design and fit outs over next 5 years.
news.summary: Amid rising space requirements, 59% of organizations on a global scale are intending to boost investments in space design and fit-outs within the next five years. The move comes as businesses around the world are modifying their hybrid work policies to encourage in-person attendance.

news.headline: Zook Cabins recognized as one of America's fastest growing companies in 2025 by Financial Times.
news.summary: A Pennsylvania-based manufacturer specializing in prefab cabins and park models, Zook Cabins, has been recognized as one of America's fastest-growing companies. The company, based in GAP, Pennsylvania, was recently included in the 2025 Financial Times Americas' Fastest Growing Companies list for the second time. This highlights Zook Cabins' impressive growth and success in the industry.

news.headline: Italian K-Sport acquires 67% stake in Australian SPT to enhance global presence in AI soccer analytics.
news.summary: In Melbourne, Australia, on April 2, 2025, K-Sport, a prominent sports performance monitoring technology company, announced the successful acquisition of a majority stake of 67% in SPT - Sport Performance Tracking. SPT, an Australian company with significant experience in the industry for over a considerable time, is now under the ownership and influence of K-Sport, signaling a noteworthy development in the sports technology sector.

news.headline: Brett Helgeson replaces Bob Hollander as Visory CEO after retirement. Helgeson was President & CEO of Adopt Technologies.
news.summary: In Chesterfield, Missouri on April 2, 2025, Visory, a prominent technology management company, reported the retirement of CEO Bob Hollander. Brett Helgeson, the ex-President & CEO of Adopt Technologies (which was bought by Visory in 2023), has taken over as the new President & CEO.

news.headline: Co-authors Mike Haven and Prashant Dubey will present on essential skills for legal ops at CLOC Global Institute 2025.
news.summary: Prashant Dubey and Mike Haven are set to present their latest book and reveal insights on the important role of legal operations experts. The event will take place in Las Vegas on April 2, 2025. Agiloft, known for its advanced contract lifecycle management solutions, made the announcement. The company's Chief Strategy Officer will be among the speakers, discussing the significant findings.

news.headline: Arleen Garza of REEP named finalist for NAA Independent Rental Owner of the Year, representing 97,000 members and 12M homes.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in San Antonio, the National Apartment Association (NAA), which serves as the primary advocate and support system for the rental housing sector, disclosed that Arleen Garza, a Co-Founder of Real Estate, has been appointed. The NAA boasts an extensive membership of almost 97,000 individuals and oversees more than 12 million apartment residences around the world.

news.headline: DriveItAway partners with Fleet-Connection to offer flexible lease program to small commercial businesses through "DriveItAway Business Preferred Program".
news.summary: A company based in Philadelphia, PA, recently introduced a new program expanding its market reach. DriveItAway unveiled the "DriveItAway Business Preferred Program," which allows small commercial businesses to access quality vehicles without the need for a long-term financial commitment or a specific credit threshold. This initiative aims to provide broader opportunities for individuals to drive and eventually purchase vehicles. The program offers a flexible lease subscription model, making it more accessible to a wider range of customers. This new program caters to the needs of small businesses and is part of DriveItAway's efforts to increase its presence in the market.

news.headline: Apollo will announce Q1 2025 financial results on May 2, 2025, at 8:30 am ET via webcast on ir.apollo.com. NYSE:APO.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Apollo (NYSE:APO) announced that it will unveil its first quarter 2025 financial results on May 2, 2025, before the NYSE trading commences. The presentation by management will be at 8:30 am ET through a public webcast on their Investor Relations website at ir.apollo.com. Those unable to attend can access a replay starting an hour post-event. Apollo shares its earnings releases on its website and via email lists. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Kraken gets restricted dealer registration in Canada, handling $2B CAD assets. Cynthia Del Pozo appointed North America GM. Gemini exits Canada.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange Kraken has received a restricted dealer registration in Canada, showcasing its commitment to Canadian investors. This comes as Kraken manages over $2 billion in Canadian dollars in assets for its users. The registration indicates compliance with specific regulations set by the Canadian Securities Administrators (CSA). Kraken has appointed Cynthia Del Pozo as the new general manager for North America, who previously worked at Gemini before their exit from the Canadian market in 2024. Del Pozo expresses optimism about the Canadian crypto market's future, emphasizing the growing recognition of digital assets. This move by Kraken follows Gemini's unexpected departure, raising questions about regulatory clarity in Canada. Kraken aims to continue serving its clients with innovative and compliant products.

news.headline: Proficient Auto Logistics buys Brothers Auto Transport, boosting fleet and market position in Northeastern markets.
news.summary: Proficient Auto Logistics, a top auto transportation and logistics services company trading on NASDAQ under the symbol PAL, has recently completed the acquisition of Brothers Auto Transport, LLC. This established carrier, located in Wind Gap, PA, has been operating since 1996. The strategic acquisition aims to enhance PAL’s fleet and workforce by adding experienced company drivers. It also bolsters the company’s foothold in crucial northeastern markets. Overall, this move provides PAL with a stronger position in the industry and access to a wider customer base.

news.headline: US digital signage market valued at $7.15 billion by 2029 fueled by retail adoption, DOOH advertising, AI, and cloud solutions.
news.summary: The digital signage market in the US is projected to grow from USD 5.66 billion in 2024 to USD 7.15 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 4.8%. Key factors driving this growth include retail industry adoption, digital out-of-home advertising development, display technology advances, AI and cloud solutions adoption, smart city expansion, rising demand for interactive kiosks, regulatory push for energy-efficient solutions, and increasing demand from the corporate sector. The market is fueled by increasing investments in digital transformation across various industries. Major players in the industry include Samsung Electronics, LG Electronics, Sharp NEC Display Solutions, Barco, Panasonic, and BrightSign LLC. The commercial segment is expected to dominate the application segment of the US digital signage market due to extensive implementation of advanced display solutions in retail outlets, hospitality venues, corporate spaces, and transportation systems.

news.headline: Rivian produced 14,611 vehicles and delivered 8,640 in Q1 2025; Financial results date set.
news.summary: Rivian Automotive, Inc. (NASDAQ: RIVN) reported its production and delivery figures for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. During this period, the company manufactured 14,611 vehicles at its Normal, Illinois facility. Additionally, they successfully delivered 8,640 vehicles to customers. These results align with Rivian's previously communicated expectations of around 14,000 vehicles produced and roughly 8,000 vehicles delivered, as shared in their recent earnings call.

news.headline: Iveda attains ISO 27001 certification, among 70,000 out of 7 million global tech businesses.
news.summary: Iveda, a prominent player in AI-powered video surveillance and smart city solutions, has achieved the esteemed ISO 27001 certification, demonstrating its commitment to robust information security management. This certification, considered one of the most rigorous globally accepted standards, is held by less than 70,000 out of around seven million tech companies globally. It assesses aspects like risk management, data protection, compliance, and continuous improvement. This accomplishment underscores Iveda's dedication to ensuring the highest standards in safeguarding information.

news.headline: DigitalOcean enhances Kubernetes with up to 1,000 nodes for easier scaling, improved networking to boost performance.
news.summary: DigitalOcean Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DOCN) unveiled enhancements to its DigitalOcean Kubernetes Service (DOKS) tailored for tech firms. The update enables seamless scaling to 1,000 nodes, facilitating expansion. It includes enhanced networking for smooth cloud integration, improved network routing for speed and lower latency, and managed networking tools to decrease operational burdens. The company continues to prioritize simplifying cloud services for tech growth.

news.headline: DigitalOcean launches Partner Network Connect for secure, high-performance multi-cloud connectivity. Simplifies networking for businesses.
news.summary: New York-based DigitalOcean Holdings Inc (NYSE: DOCN) unveiled the launch of DigitalOcean Partner Network Connect, a secure and high-performance connectivity solution for multi-cloud and hybrid-cloud networking. The service, which is now generally available, allows businesses to create private connections between DigitalOcean and other cloud services or private clouds. By avoiding the public internet, this solution enhances security and efficiency for data transfer.

news.headline: Qlik partners with Q36.5 Pro Cycling Team to enhance performance with data analytics.
news.summary: Qlik has extended its partnership with the Q36.5 Pro Cycling Team in Philadelphia, offering cutting-edge data analytics to enhance performance analysis. This collaboration aims to optimize the team's strategy and training regimen, leveraging advanced tools to analyze crucial data. Through this ongoing partnership, Qlik will contribute to the team's success by providing valuable insights for performance improvement.

news.headline: IDC releases three new AI research studies at annual event in San Jose, offering strategic guidance for organizations.
news.summary: Three distinct research studies designed by IDC aimed at providing strategic guidance for organizations navigating Artificial Intelligence are being released in San Jose, California. These studies seek to offer valuable insights and recommendations to businesses looking to leverage AI technology effectively.

news.headline: OSI Systems gets $4 million contract to provide patient monitoring solutions to a U.S. hospital.
news.summary: OSI Systems, Inc. revealed today that its Healthcare division, Spacelabs Healthcare®, will be broadening its presence with a current U.S. client by supplying about $4 million worth of patient monitoring solutions alongside related supplies and accessories to the hospital. The agreement, facilitated with the help of a strategic partner, aligns with Spacelabs' continual efforts to enhance its offerings within the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Sidus Space signs $120M preliminary agreement with Lonestar for 6 lunar data storage spacecraft.
news.summary: Sidus Space, a leading space mission enabler publicly traded on NASDAQ as SIDU, has revealed plans to expand a $120 million preliminary deal with Lonestar Data Holdings. This agreement outlines a partnership to develop and operate six lunar data storage satellites, showcasing a major advancement in space technology. The collaboration between Sidus and Lonestar aims to design, construct, and maintain these spacecraft for on-orbit operations, signifying a significant achievement in the space industry.

news.headline: Redfin releases 2025 Industry Survey on agents' views on housing market and career, based on Redfin-commissioned Ipsos report.
news.summary: In Seattle, the real estate brokerage company Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN) unveiled findings from its 2025 Industry Survey, showcasing real estate agents' perspectives on their professions, the housing sector, and crucial industry topics. The survey sheds light on agents' outlook on the changing market, as well as the hurdles and advantages they encounter amidst economic instability and industry adjustments. Sponsored by Redfin, the report presents important insights gathered from industry experts.

news.headline: CyberArk Secure Browser achieves SOC 2 Type 2 Compliance - reaffirms commitment to user security. (including NASDAQ: CYBR)
news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts and Petach Tikva, Israel, CyberArk, a leading company in identity security with NASDAQ index CYBR, revealed that their CyberArk Secure Browser has obtained SOC 2 Type 2 Compliance. This development highlights CyberArk’s dedication to implementing appropriate privilege controls to safeguard all user interactions, spanning from endpoint to application. The certification verifies that CyberArk Secure Browser employs robust controls and procedures to ensure the security and confidentiality of customer data, adhering to stringent standards.

news.headline: EnergyHub partners with GM Energy to offer grid programs for EVs and home energy storage in the US, including Chevy, GMC, and Cadillac models.
news.summary: EnergyHub, a top provider of grid-edge flexibility solutions, has teamed up with GM Energy, a division of General Motors, to incorporate GMs’ electric vehicles and home energy storage solutions into EnergyHub’s network spanning the U.S. This partnership enables Chevrolet, GMC, and Cadillac electric vehicle owners, as well as users of GM Energy’s PowerBank stationary storage system, to engage in EnergyHub-managed utility programs. Through this collaboration, eligible individuals can join utility and market programs managed by EnergyHub, enhancing their energy usage and grid participation.

news.headline: Toro Company appoints Lori A. Riley as VP of HR, showing dedication to a people-centric culture.
news.summary: In Bloomington, Minnesota, Lori Riley has been appointed as the Vice President of Human Resources at The Toro Company. This leadership decision highlights the company's dedication to fostering a culture centered around people and driving performance.

news.headline: Thermo Fisher Scientific introduces Krios 5 Cryo-TEM, improving productivity with enhanced automation, enabling atomic-resolution imaging and analysis in structural biology.
news.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific, based in Waltham, Massachusetts, has launched the Thermo Scientific™ Krios™ 5 Cryo-TEM. This cutting-edge platform is designed for studying molecular structures and interactions at an atomic level. The Krios™ 5 Cryo-TEM utilizes advanced optics and AI-powered automation to provide unparalleled throughput and accuracy. This innovation represents a significant advancement in the field of structural biology, particularly in single particle analysis (SPA) and cryo-electron microscopy. The platform offers researchers improved imaging capabilities and deeper insights into molecular mechanisms.

news.headline: Slingshot Aerospace chosen by AFWERX for RAPTOR program to track in-space activities with AI, machine learning.
news.summary: Slingshot Aerospace, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven solutions for satellite monitoring and space operations, has secured a collaboration with AFWERX for its RAPTOR program. This initiative focused on Rapid Analysis of Photometric Tracks for space Object identification and behavior Recognition aims to utilize machine learning to monitor and analyze objects in low Earth orbit. With this partnership, Slingshot will employ its expertise to track, analyze, and provide insights on the behaviors of objects in orbit. This development signifies a step forward in enhancing space traffic coordination and modeling, with a particular focus on objects in low Earth orbit.

news.headline: DDC and Hewen form joint venture, backed by $15M commitment to scale convenience meal business in China.
news.summary: A prominent Asian consumer food company, DDC Enterprise, Ltd. (NYSEAM: DDC), known as DayDayCook, disclosed a new partnership. This deal involves establishing a joint venture with Hewen Agricultural Technology Limited, a high-end prepared-meal maker. The goal is to expand the distribution of ready-to-eat (RTE) options for key e-commerce platforms, restaurant franchises, and direct-to-consumer labels in Mainland China. As part of this agreement, Hewen has vowed to produce USD 15 million in revenue.

news.headline: OWC launches OWC Archive Pro Ethernet, network-based LTO backup solution for media pros and businesses.
news.summary: An Illinois-based company, Other World Computing (OWC), known for its high-performance technology products, has introduced the OWC Archive Pro Ethernet. This innovative network-based LTO backup and archiving solution is designed for media and entertainment (M&E) professionals, government agencies, and businesses of all sizes. The product aims to provide fast and reliable storage options for users looking to maximize performance, enhance reliability, and streamline workflows.

news.headline: TotalEnergies concludes 3 international acquisitions in renewable energy from VSB, SN Power, & RES, expanding operations.
news.summary: Paris-based company TotalEnergies has recently finalized its acquisitions of VSB Group, a prominent European wind and solar developer primarily active in Germany, and SN Power, a hydropower developer focusing on projects in Africa, notably Uganda. These agreements stem from deals inked in 2024. Additionally, TotalEnergies disclosed new ventures with RES, a renewables developer, intending to purchase renewables projects in Alberta. Moreover, the enterprise has concluded its initial project acquisition. The company is listed on the Paris, London, and New York stock exchanges under the tickers TTE.

news.headline: RealPage sues Berkeley to stop ordinance banning lawful speech. City accused of unconstitutional actions.
news.summary: A lawsuit has been filed by RealPage against the City of Berkeley in Richardson, Texas, to challenge an ordinance that prohibits lawful speech. The ordinance has been deemed unconstitutional by RealPage, leading to legal action. The lawsuit aims to halt the enforcement of the ordinance and protect the rights of individuals. Important numbers related to this news include the city's population, the number of affected individuals, and any potential financial implications.

news.headline: Central Holidays now offers weekly departures to Egypt for 2025, with savings of up to $250 per person, giving travelers confidence in booking.
news.summary: Moonachie, New Jersey - On April 2, 2025, Central Holidays revealed the introduction of Guaranteed Weekly Departures to Egypt for the year 2025. This initiative provides travel advisors and their clients with the certainty of confirmed departures on popular Egypt tours. The announcement signals an opportunity for travelers to secure their spots on these sought-after tours.

news.headline: TEN Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: XHLD) to present at LD Micro Invitational XV on April 10, 2025 at 2:30 PM.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Langhorne, Pennsylvania, TEN Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: XHLD), a company specializing in event planning, production, and broadcasting services, disclosed its participation in the LD Micro Invitational XV. This event is scheduled for April 10, 2025, at 2:30 PM.

news.headline: Jeremy Witte appointed CEO of BIDFTA.COM; former CEO transitions to board role. Effective April 1, 2025.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Cincinnati, Jeremy Witte was appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer of BIDFTA.COM, a prominent company offering reverse logistics services through a data-focused recommerce platform. The appointment became effective on April 1, 2025.

news.headline: QVC Group partners with TikTok for 24/7 live shopping. Expands consumer base, utilizing TikTok's platform. 100+ million audience.
news.summary: QVC Group, a subsidiary of QVC Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: QVCGA, QVCGB, QVCGP), disclosed on April 2, 2025, its partnership with TikTok to merge live video and retail skills with TikTok’s wide-ranging audience and shopping exploration. This collaboration aims to create a constant, seamless shopping experience.

news.headline: Face Forward Aesthetics partners with Wildcat Capital Management to expand operations in Ohio, Pennsylvania, Indiana, and Nevada.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio on April 2, 2025, Face Forward Aesthetics (Face Forward) disclosed a new alliance with Wildcat Capital Management (Wildcat), a New York company. Face Forward is a prominent medical spa operator in four states: Ohio, Pennsylvania, Indiana, and Nevada. This partnership is a significant development for Face Forward as it aims to expand its reach and services through the collaboration with Wildcat.

news.headline: Flagstar Financial, Inc. will report Q1 2025 earnings on 4/25/25 at 6:00am ET and host a conference call.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Hicksville based Flagstar Financial, Inc. (NYSE: FLG) stated its intention to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Friday, April 25, 2025, at around 6:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The Company's quarterly performance for the period ending March 31, 2025 will be disclosed on that date.

news.headline: LivePerson identified as leader in AI-driven customer engagement by G2 across multiple Spring 2025 reports.
news.summary: LivePerson has received high praise for its AI agent, chatbot, conversational marketing, bot platform, live chat, and customer self-service offerings based on authentic customer feedback. The accolades were announced on April 2, 2025, in New York. LivePerson, listed on the Nasdaq as LPSN, is a prominent provider of enterprise solutions.

news.headline: Baird Medical highlights MWA tech with UCSF expert in Guangzhou and Shenzhen. Dr. Duh, UCSF Chief of Endocrine Surgery, showcased. (Characters: 127)
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Baird Medical Investment Holdings Ltd. (NASDAQ: BDMD) welcomed Dr. Quan-Yang Duh, the Chief of Endocrine Surgery at the University of California, San Francisco (UCSF). The company hosted the renowned endocrine surgeon for an event at their location in New York City.

news.headline: Nauto AI system excels, detecting all distractions within 5 seconds in VTTI study. Leader in commercial vehicle safety.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by VTTI found that Nauto's system successfully detected and alerted to 100% of distractions within five seconds. Nauto, based in Palo Alto, California, specializes in AI technology for enhancing safety and operational efficiency in commercial vehicles. This study highlights the system's effectiveness in quickly responding to potential distractions on the road.

news.headline: TE Connectivity (NYSE: TEL) will report Q2 fiscal 2025 results on April 23, 2025. Conference call for investors at 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: In Galway, Ireland, on April 2, 2025, TE Connectivity plc (NYSE: TEL) announced its plan to disclose financial outcomes for the second quarter of fiscal 2025 prior to the market opening on April 23, 2025. Interested parties can join the investor conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The call is pivotal for stakeholders looking to delve into the company’s performance updates.

news.headline: Automated Endoscopic Gastroplasty system, EndoZip™, to be presented at global medical conferences. Aimed at treating obesity.
news.summary: A company called Nitinotes, based in CAESAREA, Israel, has developed EndoZip™, an automated endoscopic suturing system catering to obesity treatment. This innovative approach aims to provide safety and effectiveness for both patients and clinicians. The system was introduced on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: Corundum Systems Biology opens US office in Cambridge, MA to expand presence in North America. Expects to boost medical innovation and microbiome research.
news.summary: A prominent Japanese investment firm, Corundum Systems Biology (CSB), is set to strengthen its presence in the field of medical innovation and microbiome research with the establishment of a new office in Cambridge, MA. The move places the company at the forefront of cutting-edge research in these areas. The announcement was made on April 2, 2025, highlighting the firm's commitment to advancing systems biology solutions. This strategic decision signifies CSB's focus on leveraging opportunities in the thriving research hub of Cambridge, MA, further solidifying its position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Everee and dlivrd partner to launch Expedite Visa® Pay Card, offering instant earnings to drivers in catering delivery.
news.summary: Everee, a top payroll software for gig work, has introduced its inaugural custom-branded card, the Expedite Visa Pay Card, in Salt Lake City on April 2, 2025. This innovative card, developed in collaboration with dlivrd, a prominent company in the catering delivery industry, is designed to enhance pay flexibility and convenience. The card establishes a new standard in the industry and aims to benefit individuals involved in gig work.

news.headline: Inventor Ryan Ames created OutletGuard to cover unprotected outlets. Product has successful coast-to-coast sales in first six months since launch.
news.summary: In Seattle on April 2, 2025, entrepreneur Ryan Ames experienced a scare when his baby son had a near-miss accident, coming into contact with a protruding coaxial stud on the wall. This incident prompted Ames to consider ensuring the safety of his modern home by covering exposed outlets. Contemplating a potential solution, he reflected on the need to protect his child from such dangers.

news.headline: New book by Henry Perlmutter explores AI-driven ecommerce trends. Released on April 2, 2025.
news.summary: AI technology is revolutionizing the ecommerce industry, as highlighted in Henry Perlmutter's latest book, AI ECOMMERCE: Mastering Ecommerce with AI and ChatGPT. Released on April 2, 2025, in PARADISE VALLEY, Ariz., this innovative guide explores the integration of AI in ecommerce. Perlmutter, a seasoned entrepreneur, provides insights into leveraging AI and ChatGPT for ecommerce success. This book offers a detailed overview of AI's influence on online retail, marking a significant shift in the way businesses operate.

news.headline: EnGenius introduces cloud-based surveillance platform with AI for advanced security, no need for traditional NVRs. Costa Mesa, April 2, 2025.
news.summary: EnGenius has introduced a new cloud-based surveillance platform merging edge and cloud AI functions. This innovative system eliminates the need for conventional NVRs by utilizing AI for enhanced contextual recognition and intelligent security attributes. The company made this announcement in Costa Mesa, California, on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: iBase-t launches Solumina i120 at Excelerate Conference, redefines digital execution in Aerospace & Defense; aimed at transformative performance gains.
news.summary: iBase-t, a prominent provider of cloud software for the Aerospace and Defense sector, has introduced MBE Pro, a cutting-edge Web UI Configurator, to enhance digital execution within the industry. The company, headquartered in Lake Forest, California, unveiled this innovative solution on April 2, 2025. This development is set to revolutionize performance standards within the Aerospace and Defense domain, marking a significant step forward in technology adoption.

news.headline: Vision Group Network marks 5th anniversary in Austin, Texas, fostering innovation and collaboration within Convenience and Mobility sectors.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on April 2, 2025, Vision Group Network celebrates its fifth anniversary in promoting innovation and collaboration in the Convenience and Mobility sectors. Through virtual forums, VGN brings together industry leaders to tackle key challenges.

news.headline: Krikey AI and ElevenLabs team up for AI-powered talking avatars, providing gaming studios and media companies access to advanced AI voice technology.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in San Francisco, Krikey AI, a prominent AI Animation software company, revealed a new collaboration with ElevenLabs, a trailblazer in AI voice technology. Through this partnership, gaming studios and media firms now have the opportunity to effortlessly utilize ElevenLabs' state-of-the-art AI voice capabilities in their productions.

news.headline: Polk County unveils JailDash-powered dashboard for incarceration metrics, provides monthly data to constituents. #Iowa #CJCC #metrics
news.summary: In April 2, 2025, in Charlotte, North Carolina, the Polk County Iowa Sheriff's Department partnered with CJCC to unveil a new jail dashboard. This dashboard offers monthly incarceration statistics to the public, allowing constituents to access important metrics. The collaboration involved utilizing data analytics to present this information effectively.
